world.name: Neon Drift
world.description: A cyberpunk metropolis where street racers compete in underground circuits beneath neon-lit skyscrapers.
world.visualStyleNotes: High contrast neon lighting, wet reflective streets, volumetric fog, cinematic wide shots. Primary palette: cyan, magenta, deep blue. Inspired by Blade Runner 2049 and Akira.

characters.description: A young street racer with a custom cybernetic arm. Quiet, determined, carries a debt to the Yakuza.
characters.visualNotes: Short dark hair, silver cybernetic right arm with exposed circuits, worn leather jacket, always wears fingerless gloves.

characters.description: Kai's childhood friend and genius mechanic. Runs an underground garage. Witty and resourceful.
characters.visualNotes: Goggles always pushed up on forehead, oil-stained overalls over a tank top, short ponytail with neon streaks.

characters.description: Yakuza enforcer who owns Kai's debt. Cold, calculating, always one step ahead.
characters.visualNotes: Immaculate white suit (stark contrast to neon streets), traditional irezumi tattoos peeking from collar, cybernetic eye implant.

scenes.description: Narrow back alley in the entertainment district. Walls covered in flickering holographic ads in Japanese and Chinese. Steam vents, puddles reflecting neon.
scenes.lighting: Overhead neon signs in cyan and pink, volumetric light beams through steam, deep shadows in corners.

scenes.description: Rei's hidden workshop beneath an abandoned parking structure. Filled with car parts, holographic blueprints, and custom rigs.
scenes.lighting: Warm tungsten work lights, blue holographic displays, contrast with cool neon from street level seeping through grates.

scenes.description: Multi-level elevated highway overlooking the city. The finish line of the underground race circuit. Breathtaking cityscape views.
scenes.lighting: Golden hour / sunset, long shadows, lens flares, city lights beginning to flicker on below.

styleSeeds.description: High contrast cyberpunk with film noir influences. Deep shadows, neon rim lights, rain-slicked surfaces.

audioElements.description: Driving synthwave bed: arpeggiated bass, rain-soaked pads, a slow build that mirrors the episode's tension.
audioElements.timingNote: Loops under the whole episode; ducks beneath dialogue and lifts on the cliffhanger.

audioElements.description: Cold-open voiceover establishing Neon Drift's world and Kai's debt, spoken over the rain-soaked alley.
audioElements.timingNote: Plays over shot s01-opening; fades out before Takeshi's first line.
